title: Washington DDS Adjudicator Scheduled Salary Rates (OFM GS Schedule, eff 2025-07-01)
description: Machine-readable Washington State General Service salary schedule (represented), giving full A–M step values (annual, monthly, hourly) for salary ranges 46, 52, 56, 62, 66, and 70, plus a class-code-to-range crosswalk for the DDS Adjudicator series (956 Adj 1 → Range 46, 955 Adj 2 → Range 52, 954 Adj 3 → Range 56, 953 Adj 5 → range TBD). Extracted from the OFM GS_2025Jul1_Represented PDF (extraction_status complete). The supervisory class 953 range is the only unresolved mapping (Range 62 candidate, manual OFM lookup noted).

columns.name: ranges.<range>.annual.<step>
columns.description: Annual salary at the given step (A–M) for the salary range.

columns.name: ranges.<range>.monthly.<step>
columns.description: Monthly salary at the given step.

columns.name: ranges.<range>.hourly.<step>
columns.description: Hourly rate at the given step.

columns.name: class_code_to_range
columns.description: Crosswalk from DDS Adjudicator class code to salary range.

source.publisher: Washington Office of Financial Management (OFM); WA DSHS Division of Disability Determination Services
source.title: General Service Salary Schedule (Represented) effective 2025-07-01

notes: Authoritative: scheduled rates parsed from the official OFM GS schedule PDF with full A–M step grids; WFSE GG CBA 2025-27 (3% 2025, 2% 2026). Step M is a premium step. Class 953 (DDS Adjudicator 5, supervisor/expert) range is unconfirmed — Range 62 is the candidate but the OFM class-spec mapping URL has rotted; treat the 953→62 row as TBD pending manual lookup. Monthly × 12 = annual per the schedule.
